index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Pong</title>
<style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#000;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;height:100vh}canvas{display:block}</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c" width="600" height="400"></canvas>
<script>
const cv=document.getElementById('c'),ctx=cv.getContext('2d');
const W=600,H=400,PW=10,PH=70,BALL=8,SPD=4;
let p1={y:H/2-PH/2,score:0},p2={y:H/2-PH/2,score:0};
let bx=W/2,by=H/2,vx=SPD,vy=SPD;
let serving=true,keys={};
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{keys[e.key]=true;if(e.key===' '&&serving){serving=false;vx=SPD*(Math.random()>0.5?1:-1);vy=(Math.random()*2-1)*SPD;}});
document.addEventListener('keyup',e=>{keys[e.key]=false;});
function reset(){bx=W/2;by=H/2;vx=0;vy=0;serving=true;}
function update(){
  if(serving)return;
  bx+=vx;by+=vy;
  if(by<=BALL||by>=H-BALL){vy=-vy;by=by<=BALL?BALL:H-BALL;}
  if(keys['w']&&p1.y>0)p1.y-=5;
  if(keys['s']&&p1.y<H-PH)p1.y+=5;
  if(keys['ArrowUp']&&p2.y>0)p2.y-=5;
  if(keys['ArrowDown']&&p2.y<H-PH)p2.y+=5;
  if(bx<=20+PW&&by>=p1.y&&by<=p1.y+PH&&vx<0){
    vx=-vx*1.05;vy+=(by-(p1.y+PH/2))*0.1;
    if(Math.abs(vx)>12)vx=12*(vx>0?1:-1);
  }
  if(bx>=W-20-PW&&by>=p2.y&&by<=p2.y+PH&&vx>0){
    vx=-vx*1.05;vy+=(by-(p2.y+PH/2))*0.1;
    if(Math.abs(vx)>12)vx=12*(vx>0?1:-1);
  }
  if(bx<0){p2.score++;reset();}
  if(bx>W){p1.score++;reset();}
}
function draw(){
  ctx.fillStyle='#000';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
  ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.15)';ctx.lineWidth=2;ctx.setLineDash([10,15]);
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(W/2,0);ctx.lineTo(W/2,H);ctx.stroke();ctx.setLineDash([]);
  ctx.fillStyle='#fff';
  ctx.font='bold 48px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
  ctx.fillText(p1.score,W/4,60);ctx.fillText(p2.score,3*W/4,60);
  if(serving){ctx.font='16px monospace';ctx.fillText('PRESS SPACE TO SERVE',W/2,H-30);}
  ctx.fillStyle='#fff';
  ctx.fillRect(20,p1.y,PW,PH);
  ctx.fillRect(W-20-PW,p2.y,PW,PH);
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(bx,by,BALL,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
  ctx.font='11px monospace';ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.4)';
  ctx.textAlign='left';ctx.fillText('P1: W/S',10,390);
  ctx.textAlign='right';ctx.fillText('P2: ↑/↓',590,390);
}
function loop(){update();draw();requestAnimationFrame(loop);}
loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
